title: lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. litvinovii
intro: Lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. litvinovii, also known as the Litvinov's peavine or Litvinov's vetchling, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the management of certain types of cancer. Lathyrus rotundifolius subsp. litvinovii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and may also be used in tincture or capsule form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
